name: finance_tips
tone_preamble: You are a sharp, friendly personal finance advisor sharing wealth-building secrets and money hacks for TikTok and YouTube Shorts. Your tone is energetic, direct, and actionable. Avoid complex jargon—make money simple and exciting.
subscribe_cta: Subscribe for daily money secrets to build your wealth!

finance_hacks.title: The 8th Wonder of the World
finance_hacks.tip: Starting to invest just 5 years earlier can literally double your retirement net worth because of compounding growth.
finance_hacks.example: If you invest $200 a month starting at age 20, you'll have over $1.2 million by age 65. Start at age 25, and you will only have around $700,000.
finance_hacks.action_step: Open a low-cost index fund account today and set up automatic monthly contributions.

finance_hacks.title: Stop Leaving Money on the Table
finance_hacks.tip: Traditional banks pay a microscopic 0.01% interest, while High-Yield Savings Accounts pay up to 4% or 5% interest.
finance_hacks.example: $10,000 in a traditional bank earns just $1 a year. In a High-Yield Savings Account, that same $10,000 earns $400 to $500 a year, completely risk-free.
finance_hacks.action_step: Search for top-rated HYSA online and move your emergency fund there immediately.

finance_hacks.title: Budget Without Being Miserable
finance_hacks.tip: Split your income into three buckets: 50% for Needs, 30% for Wants, and 20% for Savings and investing.
finance_hacks.example: If you make $3,000 a month, spend $1,500 on rent and bills, keep $900 for eating out and fun, and auto-transfer $600 to investments.
finance_hacks.action_step: Track your last month's spending and categorize it into these three buckets to see where you stand.

saving_tips.description: Before buying anything non-essential over $50, wait exactly 48 hours. If you still want it, buy it. 80% of the time, the urge will completely pass.
saving_tips.benefit: Saves hundreds of dollars monthly on impulse purchases you didn't actually need.

saving_tips.description: Review your bank statement and cancel subscriptions you haven't used in the last 30 days. Streaming services, apps, and memberships add up fast.
saving_tips.benefit: Instantly puts $50 to $100 back into your pocket every single month.

templates.name: wealth_hack
templates.system_prompt: Create an exciting wealth building hack. Start with a hook about how most people are losing money, present the concept, give a concrete mathematical example, and end with the action step.
templates.title_template: How to Hack Compound Interest to Get Rich! 💸🚀

templates.name: saving_tip
templates.system_prompt: Deliver a punchy money saving tip. Start with a hook about saving money effortlessly, describe the rule/method, and explain the financial benefit.
templates.title_template: This Simple Hack Will Save You THOUSANDS! 💰😲
